Title: Ghost in the Shell: Stand Alone Complex

Episodes.Title: SA: Public Security Section 9 - Section-9
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Atsuko Tanaka, Osamu Saka, Akio Ôtsuka
Episodes.Plot: The Minister of Foreign Affairs behaves strange after a hostage situation in a restaurant. Section 9 is sent to investigate.

Episodes.Title: SA: Runaway Evidence - Testation
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Jun'ichi Fujisaku
Episodes.Actors: Atsuko Tanaka, Osamu Saka, Akio Ôtsuka
Episodes.Plot: A battle tank is on the loose. Section 9 must investigate who is behind all this. The tachikoma's are deployed to stop the tank.

Episodes.Title: SA: A Modest Rebellion - Android and I
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Yoshiki Sakurai
Episodes.Actors: Atsuko Tanaka, Osamu Saka, Akio Ôtsuka
Episodes.Plot: Jeri-type androids are committing suicide massively. A virus seems to be the cause of this. Section 9 must seek the responsible person.

Episodes.Title: C: The Visual Device Will Laugh - Intercepter
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Marc Handler, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Atsuko Tanaka, Osamu Saka, Akio Ôtsuka
Episodes.Plot: A police detective makes discoveries on the Lauching Man. He is assassinated before he can publish his findings. Section 9 investigates the matter.

Episodes.Title: C: The Inviting Bird Will Chant - Decoy
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Jun'ichi Fujisaku
Episodes.Actors: Atsuko Tanaka, Osamu Saka, Akio Ôtsuka
Episodes.Plot: After six years of absence, the Laughing Man strikes again. This time he threatens the police head commissioner.

Episodes.Title: Mohousha wa Odoru/Meme
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Jun'ichi Fujisaku
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Makoto Aoki, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Section 9 is still looking for the Laughing Man, who appears in various shapes. Meanwhile, the police head commissioner must be protected.

Episodes.Title: Guuzousuuhai/Idolater
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Jun'ichi Fujisaku
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: Section 9 keeps an eye on the famous revolutionary Marcello Jarti, who is suspiciously visiting Japan on a regular basis.

Episodes.Title: Megumareshi Mono-tachi/Missing Hearts
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Yoshiki Sakurai
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: A young girl discovers her newly transplanted heart may have come from a less-than-legitimate source, spurring Kusanagi to undertake a personal crusade.

Episodes.Title: Net no Yami ni Sumu Otoko/Chat! Chat! Chat!
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Dai Satô
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Steve Blum, Johnny Yong Bosch
Episodes.Plot: Kusanagi eavesdrops on a futuristic chat room dedicated to the crimes committed by the Laughing Man, only to discover several of the chat room participants aren't what they seem to be.

Episodes.Title: Mitsurin-Kouro ni Uttetsuke no Hi/Jungle Cruise
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Dai Satô
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: Batou must come to terms with a dark chapter from his own past when he is called upon to track down a brutal serial killer.

Episodes.Title: Aseichuu no Mori de/Portraitz
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Yoshiki Sakurai
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: Togusa is sent to investigate a mysterious government facility for the treatment of 'cyberbrain closed shell syndrome.' What he encounters may hold the key to the Laughing Man mystery.

Episodes.Title: Tachikoma no Iede, Eiga-Kantoku no Yume/Escape From
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Yoshiki Sakurai
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, William Bassett, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: One of the Tachikoma is acting strange after being out all day with a little girl. The contents of the cyber brain that the Tachikoma found, alarms Section 9.

Episodes.Title: Terrorist/Not Equal
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Shotaro Suga
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: A girl that was kidnapped 16 years ago, suddenly appears in public again. Meanwhile, a sophisticated boats gets lost. Does the girl, one of the first cybernized people ever, have something to do with it?

Episodes.Title: Zenjidou-Shihon-shugi/YES
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Fleet Cooper, Richard Epcar, Crispin Freeman
Episodes.Plot: Criminals have information about a rich banker. Because it is suspected that an assassin is sent, Section 9 takes on the protection of the banker.

Episodes.Title: Kikai-tachi no Jikan/Machines Desirantes
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Yoshiki Sakurai
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Peter Doyle
Episodes.Plot: Kusanagi's reservations regarding Section 9's Tachikoma units comes to a head.

Episodes.Title: Kokoro no Sukima/Ag2O
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Nobutoshi Terado
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: Batou is on a mission to investigate a former boxing champion, who is suspected of espionage.

Episodes.Title: Mikansei Love Romance no Shinsou/Angels' Share
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Yoshiki Sakurai
Episodes.Actors: Atsuko Tanaka, Osamu Saka, Dino Andrade
Episodes.Plot: Aramaki goes to visit an old friend in London, who suspects a secret book-keeping in the company she works for. Their meeting takes an unexpected turn.

Episodes.Title: Ansatsu no Nijuusou/Lost Heritage
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Jun'ichi Fujisaku
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: The Chinese Minister of Foreign Affairs is threatened during a visit to Japan. The main suspect is the son of an old, deceased friend of Aramaki.

Episodes.Title: Gisou-mou ni Dakarete/Captivated
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Shotaro Suga
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: The daughter of the former prime minister is abducted by a terrorist group that he has always denied existence of.

Episodes.Title: Kesareta Kusuri/Re-view
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Dai Satô
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: Togusa makes new discoveries on the Laughing Man. He investigates the matter.

Episodes.Title: Okizari no Kiseki/Eraser
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Dai Satô
Episodes.Actors: Atsuko Tanaka, Osamu Saka, Akio Ôtsuka
Episodes.Plot: Section 9 is seeking for the fugitive doctor Imakurusu, however, they are not the only one.

Episodes.Title: Gigoku/Scandal
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Jun'ichi Fujisaku
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: Major Kusanagi gets into trouble when she is transferred into a new host body. Aramaki investigates the abduction of his brother.

Episodes.Title: Zen-Aku no Higan/Equinox
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Jun'ichi Fujisaku
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Steve Blum, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: The director of Serano Genomics is abducted again. Things get clearer on his first abduction, years ago.

Episodes.Title: Kojou Rakujitsu/Annihilation
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Yoshiki Sakurai
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Steve Cassling
Episodes.Plot: Section 9 is compromised, and the authorities seeks ways of dismantling the Section.

Episodes.Title: Shouendan-u/Barrage
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Yoshiki Sakurai
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Loy Edge
Episodes.Plot: With Batou and Motoko the only remaining members of Section 9, Batou undertakes a risky sortie to Motoko's apartment to recover her hidden weapons cache.

Episodes.Title: Kouan 9 ka, Futatabi/Stand Alone Complex
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Dai Satô
Episodes.Actors: Atsuko Tanaka, Osamu Saka, Akio Ôtsuka
Episodes.Plot: The final episode completes the first stand alone series. Togusa is released from prison but has no idea what has happened to section 9 members and still can not believe that the chief abandoned them. Episode reveals what happened...
